> Part of [[ai-registry|AI Registry]]


# NotebookLM

> AI Registry entry [AIR-61](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-61/notebooklm) — status **Production** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: —.

**Category:** AI Research & Knowledge Management
**Cost per User/Month:** Free (with [[google-workspace|Google Workspace]])
**Departments:** All

## Overview

Google's AI-powered research and note-taking tool. Source-grounded — responses are exclusively cited from uploaded documents. Generates podcast-style AI audio overviews. Particularly effective for synthesising large volumes of information.

## Capabilities

* Source-grounded Q&A with inline citations
* Multi-source synthesis
* Audio Overview (podcast-style summaries)
* Document support: PDFs, Docs, Slides, web URLs, YouTube
* Notebook organisation
* Shared notebooks for team collaboration
* Study guides, FAQs, briefing documents

## Security & Compliance

* Inherits Google Workspace compliance
* Source isolation — AI grounded only in uploaded sources, not broader internet
* No training on user data (Google confirmed)
* Workspace SSO

## Relevance

Powerful research tool for any department analysing documents. Source-grounding means responses are factual/traceable — critical for policy, legal, financial document processing. Free for all Workspace users.

*Available to all departments. Core Infrastructure tier.*

## Merged from `entities/vendors/notebooklm.md`

# NotebookLM

Google's note-taking + Q&A product. Briefly evaluated at Janus for org-chart and presentation outputs; **retired 2026-05-11** in favour of HTML-based outputs (editable, version-controllable, browser-native, cheaper). See [[2026-05-11-notebooklm-retirement-html-over-image-outputs]] for the decision record.

## Status

Archived. No active Janus use as of 2026-05-14. The architectural replacement is HTML-as-presentation per [[2026-05-12-html-as-presentation-format-adopted]]; the broader lesson lives in [[2026-05-11-html-over-powerpoint-for-read-only-content]].
